surface_verification.justification: S4 is a markdown-parse robustness fix (skeleton emphasis-strip so legacy bold ids round-trip) plus a read-only drift-protection test over the real tracked campaigns plus docs/glossary/triage; no startable web/api/cli-app surface. Empirical verification: the backfill test regenerates every tracked campaign and asserts no sub-iterate downgrades (the legacy **C1** campaign now matches its committed C1), shared 3095 + iterate 356 green.
